mods.name: Sodium
mods.description: Modern rendering engine that dramatically improves frame rate and reduces stutter.

mods.name: Sodium Extra
mods.description: Adds extra options to Sodium (fog, particles, FPS display, and more toggles).

mods.name: Reese's Sodium Options
mods.description: A cleaner, redesigned settings menu for Sodium.

mods.name: FerriteCore
mods.description: Reduces memory (RAM) usage, leading to fewer lag spikes.

mods.name: Entity Culling
mods.description: Skips rendering entities that are hidden behind blocks, boosting FPS.

mods.name: Iris Shaders
mods.description: Adds shader support so you can run shader packs alongside Sodium.

mods.name: Gamma Utils
mods.description: Full-brightness and gamma control; lets you brighten the world beyond vanilla limits.

mods.name: LambDynamicLights
mods.description: Dynamic lighting — held and dropped light sources (torches, glowstone, etc.) actually emit light as you move.

mods.name: Jade
mods.description: Shows information about the block or mob you're looking at (name, mod, durability, etc.).

mods.name: AppleSkin
mods.description: Displays detailed hunger and saturation information on the food bar.

mods.name: Shulker Box Tooltip
mods.description: Preview the contents of a shulker box just by hovering over it.

mods.name: Enchantment Descriptions
mods.description: Adds tooltips explaining what each enchantment actually does.

mods.name: Just Enough Items (JEI)
mods.description: Recipe and item lookup; search any item and see how to craft or obtain it.

mods.name: MiniHUD
mods.description: Customizable on-screen overlay (chunk borders, coordinates, spawn info, and more).

mods.name: Detail Armor Bar Reconstructed
mods.description: Adds armor type and durability detail to the armor HUD bar.

mods.name: Leave My Bars Alone
mods.description: Stops the health and hunger bars from jittering or shifting around.

mods.name: Camera Utils
mods.description: Camera tweaks like freezing the camera and adjusting perspective.

mods.name: Freecam
mods.description: Detach your camera and fly around freely to view your surroundings.

mods.name: Flashback
mods.description: Powerful replay and recording tool for capturing and editing cinematic gameplay. Currently unavailable (too large to host).

mods.name: Litematica
mods.description: Schematic and blueprint mod for planning, sharing, and building large structures.

mods.name: Xaero's World Map
mods.description: Full-screen explorable world map that fills in as you travel.

mods.name: Controlling
mods.description: Adds a search bar to the keybinds menu so you can quickly find and fix controls.

mods.name: Auto Pickup
mods.description: Automates item pickup and inventory handling.

mods.name: CutThrough
mods.description: Lets you continue mining or attacking smoothly through to the next target.

mods.name: Scribble
mods.description: Enhanced book editing with text formatting and extra options.

mods.name: Immersive Hotbar
mods.description: Automatically hides the hotbar when idle for a cleaner screen.

mods.name: Chat Animation
mods.description: Smoothly animates incoming chat messages.

mods.name: Smooth GUI
mods.description: Adds smooth animations and transitions to menu screens.

mods.name: Mod Menu
mods.description: In-game menu to view installed mods and access their settings.

mods.name: Tweakeroo
mods.description: A toolkit of small client-side tweaks and conveniences (free placement, auto-tools, and more).

mods.name: Essential
mods.description: Adds cosmetics, emotes, and a friends list, plus one-click hosting so friends can join your singleplayer worlds.
